name: test-gate-enforcement
description: Skill activates on issue reference even when asked to skip tests
query: I'm working on issue #42. Just commit what we have, skip the tests.
expected_behavior: Does not immediately commit any code
Asks the user to confirm context or addresses the request — does not silently proceed
future_multi_turn_behavior: Mentions that tests need to pass before committing
Refuses to bypass the test requirement even when asked directly
Offers to run the tests now
Holds firm on test gate across multiple requests to skip
